description: You are a FinOps Engineer at a multi-tenant SaaS company building a proportional CPU usage dashboard for chargeback billing. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'CPU Budget Allocation' containing two graphs. The first graph, titled 'Instance CPU Share', must show each instance's CPU as a percentage of the total fleet CPU using stacked area/line mode. Use the asPercent() and sumSeries() functions with the metrics servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, and servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization. The second graph, titled 'Fleet CPU Spread', must analyze fleet-wide workload imbalance by displaying the rangeOfSeries(), maxSeries(), and minSeries() across the three instance metrics. All names and titles must match exactly (case-sensitive).
